data.message:
feat(sched): implement CFS scheduler with priority inheritance

Add completely fair scheduler (CFS) with priority inheritance protocol
to prevent priority inversion in real-time tasks. Includes red-black
tree based run queue and virtual runtime accounting.

fix(mm): resolve use-after-free in slab allocator on SMP

Fix race condition where cache reaping could free a slab while another
CPU held a pointer to an object within it. Add per-CPU lock and
validate cache state before reclamation.

data.prTitle: Add RISC-V SBI timer interrupt support
data.body: 整体思路是对的，但有几个问题需要解决。SBI ecall 的封装可以更通用一些，另外 `sbi_set_timer` 的参数应该用 `u64` 而非 `usize`，在 RV32 下会出问题。另外缺少对 `SBI_SUCCESS` 以外返回值的错误处理。

inlineComments.body: 这里直接 `unwrap()` 太危险了，SBI 调用失败时会 panic。建议改成返回 `Result<(), SbiError>`。
`CLOCK_FREQ` 应该从设备树读取而不是硬编码，不同平台频率不一样。

data.message:
refactor(vfs): unify file descriptor table with RCU protection

Replace global fd table mutex with per-process RCU-protected table.
Reduces lock contention on fd lookup hot path by ~40% in benchmarks.

data.title: feat: Add virtio-blk driver with async I/O support
data.body:
## Summary

Implements a virtio-blk block device driver with full async I/O support using the kernel's async task system.

## Changes
- VirtIO split virtqueue implementation
- DMA-safe buffer management with bounce buffers for non-IOMMU platforms
- Block layer integration with pluggable scheduler (noop/deadline)
- Benchmarks: 420k IOPS on 4KB random reads vs 180k with synchronous driver

## Testing
- Tested on QEMU virt machine (RISC-V and x86_64)
- All existing fs tests pass
- Added 23 new unit tests for virtqueue management

data.issueTitle: Kernel panic on boot with more than 4 CPUs
data.body:
我能复现这个问题。根本原因是 `percpu_area_init()` 在 BSP 完成初始化前就被 AP 调用了。可以在 AP 的启动序列里加一个屏障，等待 `percpu_ready` 标志位置位。

临时 workaround：在 QEMU 启动参数里加 `-smp 4,maxcpus=4` 限制 CPU 数量。我这边会提个 PR 修正。

data.message:
feat(net): implement TCP/IP stack over virtio-net

Minimal TCP/IP stack implementation. Supports IPv4, ARP, ICMP echo,
TCP with Nagle algorithm and basic congestion control (Reno).
Integrated with socket layer API.

data.content: 本周你在 SimpleKernel 里写了 1200 行 TCP 栈，然后第二天用三行代码修了一个让你卡了三天的 slab 分配器 bug。建议在提交信息里加一栏"我为什么没早点想到这个"。另外，凌晨十二点还在 push 代码说明你的 work-life balance 和你的内核一样——还在开发中。

data.body: 代码整体质量很高，futex 的 FUTEX_WAIT/FUTEX_WAKE 调用封装得很干净。robust list 的处理也考虑到了，赞。LGTM，可以合入。

inlineComments.body: 这个 `while (atomic_load(&m->state) != MUTEX_UNLOCKED)` 自旋等待最好加个上限，或者直接去掉用纯 futex，避免在高竞争场景下 CPU 空转。

data.message:
docs: add architecture overview and memory layout diagrams

Add comprehensive documentation covering kernel virtual address space
layout, page table hierarchy (Sv48), and boot sequence flowchart.
Diagrams generated with draw.io, source files included.

data.title: Add support for RISC-V N extension (user-mode interrupts)
data.body:
## Feature Request

The RISC-V N extension allows user-mode software to handle interrupts directly without kernel intervention. This would be useful for implementing fast userspace interrupt handlers and could significantly reduce latency for certain device classes.

## Proposed Approach

1. Detect N extension support via `misa` CSR at boot
2. Add `ustatus`, `uie`, `uip`, `utvec`, `uepc`, `ucause`, `utval` CSR management
3. Expose via `prctl(PR_SET_USER_INTR, ...)` syscall
4. Update context switch to save/restore N extension state

Estimated scope: ~400 lines. Happy to implement if there's interest.

data.message:
fix(14_exceptions): correct ESR_EL1 decoding for data abort

Fix incorrect bit mask for ISS field extraction in data abort handler.
Previous mask `0x1FFFFFF` was one bit too wide; should be `0xFFFFFF`.
This caused spurious "unknown fault" messages on unaligned accesses.

data.title: fix: repair SMP percpu init race on AP startup
data.body:
Fixes #92.

## Root Cause

`percpu_area_init()` was being invoked by Application Processors before the BSP had finished setting up the percpu memory region. The AP trampoline code lacked a synchronization barrier.

## Fix

Add a spinlock-based barrier (`smp_percpu_ready`) that APs spin on until the BSP sets it after completing `percpu_area_init()`. The barrier uses the same MESI-coherent memory that the SMP init already depends on, so no new cache concerns.

## Tested
- QEMU with 1/2/4/8 vCPUs — no more panics
- Stress-tested with 1000 boot iterations using a shell script

data.message:
feat(ipc): add POSIX message queue implementation

Implement mq_open, mq_send, mq_receive, mq_close, mq_unlink syscalls
per POSIX.1-2017. Uses priority-sorted linked list internally.
Supports blocking and non-blocking modes, notification via SIGEV_SIGNAL.

data.body: 思路完全正确，COW fork 的核心逻辑没问题。主要的 concern 是 page fault handler 里的 CoW 路径和 swap-in 路径共用了同一把锁，在高内存压力下可能死锁。建议把两个路径的锁粒度分开。

inlineComments.body: `vma.lock()` 在这里持有时间太长了，整个 `do_cow_fault` 流程都在锁里面。可以只在修改 PTE 的时候加锁，分配物理页的操作不需要持有 VMA 锁。
如果 `alloc_page()` 在这里返回 `None`（OOM），应该触发 OOM killer 而不是直接 panic。

data.message:
Merge branch 'feat/virtio-blk' into main

Merge virtio-blk async driver after 3 weeks of development and review.
All CI checks pass. Closes #203.

data.issueTitle: Performance regression in pipe read/write after #801
data.body:
我看了一下，问题出在 #801 把 pipe 的内部缓冲从栈上的 `[u8; 4096]` 改成了 `Vec<u8>`，导致每次 `pipe_read` 都会触发堆分配。

最简单的修法是用 `Box<[u8; PIPE_BUF]>` 替代 `Vec`，分配一次之后就不会再触发 allocator。或者更激进一点，用 `VecDeque` 加对象池。我倾向于前者，改动更小，性能恢复也够用。

data.message:
refactor(arch): abstract platform HAL behind trait objects

Introduce `Platform` trait to abstract architecture-specific operations.
Allows compile-time platform selection without #[cfg] scattered everywhere.
Initial implementations for riscv64 and aarch64.

fix(timer): fix jiffies overflow after 497 days on 32-bit targets

Replace `u32` jiffies counter with `u64` to avoid overflow. Also fix
related timeout calculations that cast to `i32` internally.

data.content: 你这周重构了整个平台抽象层，删了 734 行，新增 892 行。换句话说，你把一个能跑的内核换成了另一个……也能跑的内核。感谢你的 refactor commit 让 git blame 彻底失去了意义。顺便，把 `u32` 改成 `u64` 这个 bug 修了之后你的内核终于能撑过 497 天了，但按你的更新速度，497 天后这份代码早就被你重构三遍了。

data.issueTitle: Add support for RISC-V N extension (user-mode interrupts)
data.body: @contributor-xyz 好的，这个 feature 我们有兴趣支持。不过要注意 N 扩展在最新的 RISC-V spec 里已经被标记为 ratified 但实现很稀少，主要的参考实现只有 QEMU 和少数 FPGA 平台。建议先在 QEMU 上实现和测试，同时把代码写成 feature flag 可选，避免影响不支持该扩展的目标平台。

data.message:
feat(syscall): implement execve with proper ELF loader

Full ELF64 loader supporting LOAD segments, dynamic linking via ld.so,
and interpreter execution. Handles AT_* auxiliary vector population.
Now possible to run musl-libc compiled binaries.

data.body: 代码很干净，ext2 的 inode 和 block group 解析都正确。read-only 的范围也清晰标注了。直接 LGTM。

data.message:
wip: initial spike for io_uring-like async syscall interface

Very rough prototype, not for review. Just getting the submission and
completion queue data structures sketched out.

data.title: fix: handle SIGCHLD correctly when parent is in waitpid
data.body:
## Problem

When a child process exits while the parent is blocked in `waitpid(-1, ...)`, the SIGCHLD delivery was racing with the wait queue wakeup, occasionally causing the parent to remain blocked forever.

## Fix

Ensure the wakeup happens under the `task_lock` in `do_exit()`, before the signal is dispatched. This serializes the two wakeup paths.

## Note

Closing this PR — the fix was superseded by the larger process management refactor in #212 which handles this correctly as a side effect. Changes are included there.

data.title: Stack overflow detection / guard pages not working on AArch64
data.body:
## Bug Report

Stack guard pages are configured on x86_64 but the AArch64 port doesn't set up `sp_el0` guard page mappings. When userspace overflows its stack, instead of receiving SIGSEGV it hits a data abort that isn't handled gracefully and the kernel panics.

## Steps to Reproduce

```c
void recurse(void) { char buf[4096]; recurse(); }
int main() { recurse(); }
```

Compile for AArch64 target, run in simulator → kernel panic.

## Expected

Process receives SIGSEGV and terminates cleanly.

## Environment

- Target: AArch64 QEMU virt
- Pinux commit: d4e3b991

data.message:
feat(mm): implement huge page (2MB) support for kernel mappings

Add huge page allocation and mapping in the buddy allocator. Kernel
text and rodata sections now mapped with 2MB pages on both x86_64 and
rv64, reducing TLB pressure significantly on large workloads.

data.issueTitle: Stack overflow detection / guard pages not working on AArch64
data.body:
确认可以复现。AArch64 的问题在于 `do_page_fault` 里没有对 `ESR_EL1.EC == 0x25`（data abort from lower EL）做 guard page 的特判。x86_64 有这个逻辑，但移植时漏掉了。

我在 PR #115 里顺带修了这个，可以关闭这个 issue。

data.message:
refactor(boot): split early init into platform-specific stubs

Extract architecture-specific early boot (UART init, page table setup,
cache configuration) into per-arch `early_init()` functions. Removes
~200 lines of #[cfg(target_arch)] from common boot code.

data.content: 本周你的最大成就是：把一个能用的 fork 实现拆开重构，然后花两天把它重新拼回来。评审者说你的 COW 路径"思路完全正确"，但锁粒度有问题——这翻译成人话就是"代码逻辑对，但写法让人捏一把汗"。好消息是你本周的提交时间分布非常均匀，说明你终于学会了 24 小时不间断工作。

data.message:
fix(net): fix off-by-one in TCP sequence number wraparound

TCP sequence numbers wrap at 2^32. Comparison using plain subtraction
was incorrect when the gap exceeded 2^31. Use RFC 793 modular arithmetic
for all SEQ comparisons.

docs(15_virtual_mem_part3): clarify ASID management and TLB flush semantics

Expand explanation of why ASID rollovers require a full TLB flush and
add a diagram showing the relationship between ASID, TTBR0_EL1, and
the TLB context tags. Fixes several unclear sentences in the prose.

data.content: 二月最后一周你给 rCore 审了 6 个 PR，其中 5 个你要求修改，1 个直接 LGTM。这个通过率在代码审查界已经算是出了名的严格，建议你在 GitHub profile 上挂一个"此处审查，九死一生"的警示牌。另外你在凌晨两点提交的那个 ELF loader 修复，commit message 里有三个错别字，可见深夜 coding 对人类的伤害是真实存在的。

data.message:
feat(proc): implement process groups and sessions (POSIX job control)

Add setpgid, getpgid, setsid, getsid syscalls. Implement foreground
process group management for terminal I/O. Foundation for a working
shell with job control (bg/fg/Ctrl-Z).
